content:
Just jumping in to mention that static dispatch section of docs here have links that point to nothing, in case it slipped through somewhere in a refactor.

https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/tree/main/docs/langref
thanks! The langref has a bunch of unfinished stuff in there at the moment :sweat_smile:
Also, I'm an absolute Zulip newb and noticed I posted this in a totally weird spot - apologies!
3 messages were moved here from #bugs > Two panics by Richard Feldman.
no worries, a cool thing about Zulip is you can move things around after the fact - like this! :smiley:
